mapper.select: select * from cgq_sj where time between DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 30 MINUTE) and NOW() and sbbh = #{sbbh}
select * from cgq_sj where time between DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 10 MINUTE) and NOW() and sbbh = #{sbbh} and CONVERT(pjz,DECIMAL(9,1)) >= 10.8
select * from cgq_sj where time between DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL - 20 MINUTE) and NOW() and sbbh = #{sbbh} and CONVERT(pjz,DECIMAL(9,1)) <= 8.0
select * from cgq_spxx where devid in (select deviceid from cgq_sbgl where sbbh = #{sbbh}) order by xtsj desc
select * from cgq_rygl where #{id} like concat(concat('%', id), '%')
mapper.update: update cgq_sbgl set sffs = #{sffs} where id = #{id}
update cgq_sbgl set sffs1 = #{sffs1} where id = #{id}
mapper.delete: delete from cgq_sj where xtsj >= DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL -5 MINUTE) and id not in(select t.min_id from (select MIN(id) as min_id from cgq_sj group by sbbh,time) t)
